coupon.source_phrase_block: 80 Carby Street, Westwood, MA, 02090 Map (781) 326-1770 Hale Reservation's ponds, trails, plants, animals, birds, fish, and insects spark curiosity. Lifelong learners enjoy limitless opportunities for growth and discovery here, whether they're overcoming a fear of heights on the challenge course or spying a family of deer along a trail. Pass benefits: Free parking for one vehicle at Hale Reservation. Includes trail map. Does not include admission to South Beach. Visit the Hale Reservation's website. This pass must be reserved through the library's online catalog. The pass must be picked up and returned to the library's Brookline Village location. No passes are available at this time.
